metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins: code review on Gerrit/GitHub, image generation with Nano Banana, cqfd help, SEAPATH virtual sandbox, and SFL Slidev branding.

plugins.name: gerrit
plugins.description: Review Gerrit changes and address Gerrit review comments. Bundles a Python helper that talks to the Gerrit REST API.

plugins.name: github-pr
plugins.description: Review GitHub pull requests and address PR review comments via the gh CLI.

plugins.name: cqfd
plugins.description: Help with cqfd: .cqfdrc files, Dockerfiles, build flavors, release archives.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: Generate or edit images using Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview). Bundles the nano-banana CLI wrapper.

plugins.name: slidev-sfl
plugins.description: Create Savoir-faire Linux branded first and last slides for Slidev presentations.

plugins.name: seapath-virtual-sandbox
plugins.description: Provision, boot, and operate the 3-node SEAPATH virtual sandbox (QEMU/KVM via Terraform + Ansible).
